summary: Work Order Stage Payment System - Backend API testing completed. All 21 tests passed (100%). Tested: SE partial payment requests, 4-level approval pipeline (SE→PM→Planning→Accountant), stage finish with remarks, balance validation, and rejection flow.
seed_data_creation: Test work order created with TEST_ prefix during tests (contractor: Kumar Painters, project: proj_12f23331b542)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Order Stage Payment System fully tested. Backend APIs verified: POST /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders (create WO with stages), PATCH /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{woid}/stages/{sid}/request-payment (SE partial payment request), PATCH /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{woid}/stages/{sid}/approve (4-level approval: PM→Planning→Accountant), PATCH /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{woid}/stages/{sid}/finish (SE finish stage with remarks). All validation rules working: cannot request more than balance, cannot finish with pending requests, cannot request payment after stage finished.

backend_apis.create_work_order_with_stages: PASS - POST /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders creates WO with stages array
backend_apis.se_request_partial_payment: PASS - PATCH .../request-payment creates payment_request in stage's payment_requests array
backend_apis.se_multiple_partial_payments: PASS - Multiple partial payments allowed per stage
backend_apis.balance_validation: PASS - Cannot request more than (total - released - pending)
backend_apis.pm_approval: PASS - PM moves status from 'requested' to 'pm_approved'
backend_apis.planning_approval: PASS - Planning moves status from 'pm_approved' to 'planning_approved'
backend_apis.accountant_approval: PASS - Accountant moves status from 'planning_approved' to 'approved' with approved_amount
backend_apis.stage_amounts_tracking: PASS - amount_released and amount_pending correctly updated
backend_apis.cannot_finish_with_pending: PASS - Returns 400 if pending payment requests exist
backend_apis.se_finish_stage: PASS - PATCH .../finish marks stage as 'finished' with remarks
backend_apis.no_payment_after_finish: PASS - Returns 400 if stage is already finished
backend_apis.pm_reject_payment: PASS - PM can reject with reason, status becomes 'rejected'
backend_apis.get_work_orders_list: PASS - GET /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders returns all WOs with stages
backend_apis.get_single_work_order: PASS - GET /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{woid} returns full WO details
backend_apis.invalid_work_order_404: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent work order

api_endpoints_tested.description: SE requests partial payment for stage

approval_pipeline_flow.step_4: Accountant approves with amount → status: 'approved', amount_released updated
